category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

title.en: China-to-South Korea Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against South Korean KC safety certification, KS C standards, KEPCO distributed-generation interconnection, and KN EMC expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与韩国 KC 安全认证、KS C 标准、KEPCO 分布式电源并网及 KN EMC 要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與韓國 KC 安全認證、KS C 標準、KEPCO 分散式電源併網及 KN EMC 要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KC certificate, KATS designation decision, KEPCO interconnection approval, customs determination, EMC registration decision, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Korean product-safety law, KS C standards, KN EMC notices, Korean-language marking, and utility interconnection requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KC 证书、KATS 指定决定、KEPCO 并网批准、海关裁定、EMC 登记决定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行韩国产品安全法律、KS C 标准、KN EMC 公告、韩文标识及电力公司并网要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KC 證書、KATS 指定決定、KEPCO 併網批准、海關裁定、EMC 登記決定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行韓國產品安全法律、KS C 標準、KN EMC 公告、韓文標識及電力公司併網要求。

answer_first.en: South Korea is not a CE/CCC carry-over market: in-scope grid-tied PV inverters need compulsory KC safety certification and KC marking under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, evidence against applicable KS C/IEC inverter standards, KN EMC compliance where applicable, and separate KEPCO distributed-generation interconnection acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 韩国不能直接沿用 CE 或 CCC：适用范围内的并网光伏逆变器须依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得强制性 KC 安全认证并加贴 KC 标志，提供适用 KS C/IEC 逆变器标准证据，在适用时满足 KN EMC 要求，并另行取得 KEPCO 分布式电源并网认可。
answer_first.zht: 韓國不能直接沿用 CE 或 CCC：適用範圍內的併網光伏逆變器須依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得強制性 KC 安全認證並加貼 KC 標誌，提供適用 KS C/IEC 逆變器標準證據，在適用時滿足 KN EMC 要求，並另行取得 KEPCO 分散式電源併網認可。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Korean regulator, KATS, MOTIE, KEPCO, RRA/National Radio Research Agency, standards body, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
